title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Colgate-Palmolive India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Colgate-Palmolive India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Colgate-Palmolive India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Colgate-Palmolive India:
Colgate-Palmolive India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colgate-Palmolive India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
